falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes above 5,600 on any day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A new all-time high would invalidate the 'bottom' pattern match, as the August 2024 bottom was followed by a sustained rally from lower levels, not an immediate breakout to new highs; this suggests the pattern was misidentified or the market structure has changed fundamentally

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes below 12.00 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained sub-12 VIX indicates complacency and risk-on stability that is inconsistent with post-bottom volatility regimes; the August 2024 bottom saw VIX spike above 38 then gradually normalize to 15-20, so rapid compression to pre-crisis levels would mean the 'bottom' signal was false and no genuine capitulation occurred

falsification_conditions.condition: 10-year Treasury yield drops below 3.80% and holds there for 5 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A flight-to-quality bond rally of this magnitude would signal recession fear or financial stress, not a healthy bottom; the August 2024 bottom coincided with yields stabilizing around 3.9-4.2% as growth concerns moderated, so a sharp breakdown in yields would indicate the macro engine misread the economic trajectory and the 'HOLD' signal should have been defensive positioning

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
